target_gate.correctness: DB rows, StudentTrack count, embedding rows, and model agreement must not regress
target_gate.post_stage_timeline: prove serial lifecycle timestamps before any streaming implementation
target_gate.rollback: OFFLINE_STREAM_POST_STAGES and OFFLINE_STREAM_POST_STAGE_TIMELINE must return to 0
target_gate.streaming_post_stages_enabled: must remain false for this measurement-only cycle
